name: Phillips 66
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is an energy manufacturing and logistics company operating across four segments: Midstream, Chemicals, Refining, and Marketing & Specialties. The company refines crude oil into fuels, processes and transports natural gas liquids, produces petrochemicals through equity affiliates, and markets refined petroleum products. It operates refineries, pipelines, terminals, and gathering assets across the U.S. and internationally, including renewable fuels facilities.
